hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.rs"'; then cargo fmt --all 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*/src/api/[^"]*\.rs"'; then OUT=$(just check-typegen 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "⚠️  typegen drift detected after src/api/*.rs edit. Run 'just typegen' and commit packages/api-client/src/schema.d.ts alongside your handler change." >&2; echo "$OUT" | tail -10 >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

F=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | sed -nE 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"([^"]+)".*/\1/p' | head -1); case "$F" in *.md|*.mdx|*.rs|*.sql) case "$F" in */prompts/*.md.j2|*/vendor/*|*/target/*|*/node_modules/*|*/dist/*|*/.scratchpad/plans/entraid-auth/*) exit 0 ;; esac; if [ -f "$F" ]; then HITS=$(grep -nE '[a-z)\"0-9][[:space:]]*—[[:space:]]*[a-z]|[a-z][a-zA-Z)0-9][[:space:]]*;[[:space:]]*[a-zA-Z]' "$F" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '^[0-9]+:[[:space:]]*(\||[-*][[:space:]]+\*\*|##)' | head -3); if [ -n "$HITS" ]; then echo "⚠️  Writing-guide scan (em-dash or semicolon in prose) in $F:" >&2; echo "$HITS" >&2; echo "Reference: .claude/rules/writing-guide.md. Run /writing-guide-scan for full check." >&2; fi; fi ;; esac

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"git commit'; then SIZE_GB=$(du -sk target 2>/dev/null | awk '{printf "%d", $1/1024/1024}'); if [ -n "$SIZE_GB" ] && [ "$SIZE_GB" -ge 40 ]; then echo "💾 Storage nudge: target/ is ${SIZE_GB} GB (threshold 40 GB). Consider running /target-sweep-guard or 'just sweep-target' at the next natural checkpoint." >&2; fi; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'migrations/'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Migration files are immutable. Create a new timestamped migration instead."}'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'packages/api-client/src/schema.d.ts'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "schema.d.ts is generated output. Modify src/api/**/*.rs utoipa annotations, then run `just typegen` to regenerate."}'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*(/\.env($|\.)|secrets\.redb|\.keychain-access|\.github-token|\.cargo/credentials)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "This file holds secrets. Edit refused. For .env values, edit .env.example and document the variable. For runtime secrets use `spacebot secrets` CLI or the OS Keychain UI. secrets.redb is the encrypted store; never hand-edit."}'; fi
